notes: Hand-crafted gold node_sets for offline Pipeline regression. A real LLM run must reproduce the structure (fact shape + qualifier keys present) though exact wording will drift.

episodes.speaker: Caroline
episodes.text: Hey Mel! Good to see you! How have you been?

episodes.speaker: Melanie
episodes.text: Hey Caroline! Good to see you! I'm swamped with the kids & work. What's up with you? Anything new?

episodes.speaker: Caroline
episodes.text: I went to a LGBTQ support group yesterday and it was so powerful.

episodes.speaker: Melanie
episodes.text: Wow, that's cool, Caroline! What happened that was so awesome? Did you hear any inspiring stories?

episodes.speaker: Caroline
episodes.text: The transgender stories were so inspiring! I was so happy and thankful for all the support.

episodes.speaker: Melanie
episodes.text: Wow, love that painting! So cool you found such a helpful group. What's it done for you?

episodes.speaker: Caroline
episodes.text: The support group has made me feel accepted and given me courage to embrace myself.

episodes.speaker: Melanie
episodes.text: That's really cool. You've got guts. What now?

episodes.speaker: Caroline
episodes.text: Gonna continue my edu and check out career options, which is pretty exciting!

episodes.speaker: Melanie
episodes.text: Wow, Caroline! What kinda jobs are you thinkin' of? Anything that stands out?

episodes.speaker: Caroline
episodes.text: I'm keen on counseling or working in mental health - I'd love to support those with similar issues.

episodes.speaker: Melanie
episodes.text: You'd be a great counselor! Your empathy and understanding will really help the people you work with. By the way, take a look at this.

episodes.speaker: Caroline
episodes.text: Thanks, Melanie! That's really sweet. Is this your own painting?

episodes.speaker: Melanie
episodes.text: Yeah, I painted that lake sunrise last year! It's special to me.

episodes.speaker: Caroline
episodes.text: Wow, Melanie! The colors really blend nicely. Painting looks like a great outlet for expressing yourself.

episodes.speaker: Melanie
episodes.text: Thanks, Caroline! Painting's a fun way to express my feelings and get creative. It's a great way to relax after a long day.
